sourcePrompt: A 37mm anti-aircraft gun, an NVA towed autocannon about six meters long with its barrel raised high. A single long thin barrel with a small flash cone elevates steeply from a cradle between two flat armor shield plates, gunner seats and handwheels hang off the mount, and the whole gun rides a cruciform carriage on two rubber road wheels with outrigger arms. Dark green steel, lean and skyward.
